ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Continued To Feb-18-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion By Pacific Soybean To Quash Subpoena To Bank Of America;
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Pacific Soybean's Motion To Quash Subpoena To Bank Of America is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as it seeks to quash the subpoena as to Category 2 as it is overly broad and invades the right to financial privacy without good cause. The motion does not object to items 3 and 4. The motion is denied as to item 1. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
